calendar.matters:
Petitioners Second Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Verified Petition To Reduce Required Voting Percentage To Amend Declaration Of Conditions, Covenants And Restrictions Of Hawthorne Place, A Condominium Project
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Hanh T. Pham; Hughes Gill Cochrane Tinetti PC; 925-926-1200; appearing on behalf of petitioner Hawthorne Place Owners Association.

No other appearances. Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER'S SECOND AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION TO REDUCE REQUIRED VOTING PERCENTAGE TO AMEND DECLARATION OF CONDITIONS, COVENANTS AND RESTRICTIONS OF HAWTHORNE PLACE, A CONDOMINIUM PROJECT is GRANTED as requested. Moving party to present an order for execution at the hearing.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Hearing On Verified Petition To Reduce Required Voting Percentage To Amend Declaration Of Conditions, Covenants And Restrictions Of Hawthorne Place, A Condominium Project

This matter was continued from September 15, 2022 and moving party was instructed to provide notice of continued hearing. No proof of service of notice of continued hearing on file as of October 13, 2022. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
